---
name: "Bug Report"
about: Report a bug or issue to help improve BizInsight-AI
title: "[BUG] - Short description of the issue"
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---
### Description
<!-- Just say exactly what is broken right now without overcomplicating it -->
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

### Steps to Reproduce
<!-- Commands needed to make the bug happen again. -->
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Run the app or backend (e.g., `streamlit run app.py` or `python run_chatbot_api.py`)
2. Trigger endpoint or UI feature '....' (e.g., upload custom feedback CSV, run Smart Complaint Clustering, or send a query to the RAG Chatbot)
3. Check terminal logs, browser console, or database files
4. See error

### Expected Behavior
<!-- What the correct, working behavior should look like. -->
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

### Screenshots / Logs
<!-- Just drop a screenshot or paste the red error text from your terminal. -->
If applicable, add screenshots, local terminal tracebacks, Streamlit execution logs, or FastAPI/Uvicorn server runtime errors to help explain your problem.

### Environment Context
<!-- What environment are you running? Fill in your versions below. -->
- **OS:** [e.g. Windows 11, macOS, Ubuntu]
- **Python Version:** [e.g., 3.10]
- **Streamlit Version:** [e.g., 1.32.0]
- **Docker Version:** [if applicable]

### Additional context
<!-- For anything else not covered above -->
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., column mapping issues in the custom CSV, SQLite connection drops, ChromaDB vector sync failures, or OpenRouter/Gemini API timeouts).
